holdings.infoBox: ROUS is an equity ETF with a total of 323 individual holdings. The top holdings are Seagate Technology Holdings stock at 1.84%, Western Digital at 1.64%, Alphabet at 1.43%, Cisco Systems at 1.35%, and KLA Corporation at 1.29%.

overview.description: The Hartford Multifactor US Equity ETF (ROUS) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Hartford Multi-factor Large Cap index. The fund tracks an index of US large-cap stocks. The index relies on value, momentum and quality factors, among others. ROUS was launched on Feb 25, 2015 and is issued by The Hartford.
